mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adoptionapplication (user_id, animal_id, status, applied_at, notes) VALUES (#{userId}, #{animalId}, '审核中', NOW(),#{notes});
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adoptionapplication WHERE animal_id = #{animalId} AND status = '审核中'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM adoptionapplication WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND animal_id = #{animalId}
SELECT * FROM adoptionapplication WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND animal_id = #{animalId}
SELECT aa.* FROM adoptionapplication aa JOIN animal a ON aa.animal_id = a.animal_id WHERE aa.user_id = #{userId} AND a.breed LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breed}, '%')
